Swimming Pool (Operational),"Swimming pool is for residents and authorized guests only, guests must be accompanied by a resident. Pool usage allowed only during designated timings. Entry without proper swimwear is strictly prohibited. Mandatory to shower before entering the pool. Persons with skin infections, open wounds, or contagious illnesses are not permitted. Spitting, urinating, or littering is prohibited. Children below 12 years must be accompanied by an adult. Running, pushing, diving in shallow areas, or unsafe behavior is prohibited. Members use the pool at their own risk if no lifeguard is present. Consumption of food, alcohol, or beverages is not allowed. Glass items are strictly prohibited. Infants must wear swim diapers. Floatation devices allowed only if safe and non-intrusive. Enjoy a peaceful swim, please avoid loud music in and around the pool area.","Morning (07:00 AM - 11:00 AM) | Evening (04:00 PM - 09:00 PM) | Monday (Weekly off)",NA"
